summaries.headline: Tom is top of the Haynes heap
summaries.text: Tom leads with 7 points, ahead by the sacred art of tie-break sorcery. Germany is doing the heavy lifting with 3 points, which is the sort of delegation strategy consultants charge for. 24 matches are in the books. Meanwhile Leo is studying the table with the haunted focus of someone trying to assemble furniture without the instructions.

summaries.headline: Tom is top of the Haynes heap
summaries.text: Tom leads with 7 points, ahead by the sacred art of tie-break sorcery. Germany is doing the heavy lifting with 3 points, which is the sort of delegation strategy consultants charge for. 24 matches are in the books. Full roll call: Tom is marching around like they own the fixture list: 7 points, with Germany as the chief supplier of hope. Nina is quietly spreadsheeting their way into relevance: 7 points, with Colombia as the chief supplier of hope. Asha has the calm expression of someone pretending this was the plan: 7 points, with France as the chief supplier of hope. Maya is relying on vibes, goal difference, and a small tactical candle: 7 points, with Mexico as the chief supplier of hope. Owen has entered the dangerous phase known as mathematically interesting: 6 points, with Sweden as the chief supplier of hope. Sam is hovering mid-table with strong 'wait until the knockouts' energy: 5 points, with Argentina as the chief supplier of hope. Chris is currently negotiating with fate via three nervous group-stage teams: 5 points, with England as the chief supplier of hope. Priya is marching around like they own the fixture list: 4 points, with USA as the chief supplier of hope. Grace is quietly spreadsheeting their way into relevance: 4 points, with Austria as the chief supplier of hope. Ravi has the calm expression of someone pretending this was the plan: 4 points, with Ivory Coast as the chief supplier of hope. Leo is relying on vibes, goal difference, and a small tactical candle: 2 points, with Netherlands as the chief supplier of hope. Zoe has entered the dangerous phase known as mathematically interesting: 1 point, with Bosnia & Herzegovina as the chief supplier of hope. Ben is hovering mid-table with strong 'wait until the knockouts' energy: 1 point, with Saudi Arabia as the chief supplier of hope. Ella is currently negotiating with fate via three nervous group-stage teams: 1 point, with Iran as the chief supplier of hope.

summaries.headline: Tom, Nina, Asha, Maya set the pace
summaries.text: Tom, Nina, Asha, Maya lead on 7 points, ahead by the sacred art of tie-break sorcery. 24 results are in; the table in miniature is 7 points: Tom, Nina, Asha, Maya; 6 points: Owen; 5 points: Sam, Chris; 4 points: Priya, Grace, Ravi; 2 points: Leo; 1 point: Zoe, Ben, Ella. Current chief helpers: Tom/Germany, Nina/Colombia, Asha/France. Everyone is named, nobody can hide, and the spreadsheet is already giving main-character energy.

summaries.headline: Recent damage report
summaries.text: Colombia (Nina) beat Uzbekistan (Zoe) 3-1; points were acquired, dignity was redistributed. Ghana (Tom) slapped a 1-0 receipt on Panama (Ravi), very arcade cabinet final-boss behaviour. England (Chris) got the glow-up with a 4-2 win over Croatia (Owen); the loser is now staring meaningfully at the fixtures. Overall, Tom, Nina, Asha, Maya are sharing top spot by tie-break wizardry on 7 points, while Zoe, Ben, Ella are propping up the bracket on 1 point like unpaid stagehands. The table snapshot: 7 points: Tom, Nina, Asha, Maya; 6 points: Owen; 5 points: Sam, Chris; 4 points: Priya, Grace, Ravi; 2 points: Leo; 1 point: Zoe, Ben, Ella.
